build.notes: Build passes with pre-existing asset size warnings (js/editor.js 346 KiB). No errors introduced by Header changes.

issues.description: 4 pre-existing lint errors in unrelated blocks (Hero, TestimonialsCarousel)
issues.note: No lint errors in Header-related files. All modified files pass linting.

registration.notes: Block registration validation passed. All schema checks, naming conventions, file references, child blocks, and attribute types are correct.

attributes.notes: All attributes defined in block.json are properly used in TSX and PHP files. No unused attributes detected.

edgeCases.notes: Test page includes various edge cases: no submenu items, single submenu, multiple submenus, long text in submenu items, no search link, fixed behavior variations.

testsRun.test: Keyboard navigation - Tab to menu items
testsRun.notes: Focus visible outline displays correctly on menu items when tabbing through navigation
ArrowDown on button with submenu opens the submenu and focuses first item
ArrowDown within open submenu moves focus to next submenu item
First header becomes fixed with correct width (left-0 right-0) when scrolling

interactiveBehavior.notes: JavaScript keyboard navigation refactoring works correctly. Submenu opens via keyboard and ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigation functions properly. Focus outline styles are visible.

accessibility.notes: Focus-visible outline styles added to all interactive elements (menu buttons, links, submenu items). White outline (focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2) is visible against dark charcoal background.

patternCompliance.notes: Keyboard navigation with ArrowUp/ArrowDown works correctly. Focus management improved with currentIndex tracking based on document.activeElement.

markupDuplication.notes: No unnecessary markup duplication detected. Desktop and mobile search forms are separate intentional duplicates due to different layout contexts (utility row vs collapsed nav). Mobile CTA section is mobile-only with md:hidden.

issues.details: Found 6 instances of manual attribute extraction using $var = $attributes['key'] pattern. The theme's inc/helpers/blocks.php automatically calls extract($attributes, EXTR_SKIP) before including PHP templates, so manual extraction is redundant and violates project conventions.
issues.fix: Remove all manual $var = $attributes['key'] assignments. Use variables directly with null coalescing for safe defaults (e.g., $logoId ?? null). Add @var docblock annotations for all camelCase variables to prevent PHP_CodeSniffer warnings.

issues.description: HeaderMain.php missing @var docblock annotations for camelCase variables
issues.fix: Add @var type annotations to the docblock at the top of the file for all camelCase attribute variables. This tells PHP_CodeSniffer these variables come from block attributes and should be ignored for snake_case warnings.

issues.description: Desktop search input has different classes in PHP vs TSX
issues.details: Desktop search input in PHP has 'uppercase' class but should have 'normal-case placeholder:uppercase' to match the spec and the mobile search implementation. Mobile search (line 163) is correct with 'normal-case placeholder:uppercase'.

passed: HTML structure sync between TSX and PHP is correct

innerBlocks.notes: Header uses inner blocks (header-main, header-main-item, header-main-sub-item). Test page shows proper nesting with various configurations. Inner block content renders correctly on frontend.

specCompliance.notes: All 9 changes from the planning spec are implemented: logo spans two rows (max-h removed), submenu gap (md:mt-4), submenu text alignment (md:-ml-6), demo container stacking (isolate), first block fixed for testing, keyboard arrow navigation fix, focus outline visibility, fixed header width (left-0 right-0), search placeholder uppercase. Test page has 9 header instances covering various configurations.

issues.details: The file contains 6 instances of manual attribute extraction using the pattern $var = $attributes['key'] ?? default. This violates project conventions because the theme's inc/helpers/blocks.php automatically calls extract($attributes, EXTR_SKIP) before including PHP templates.
issues.fix: Remove all lines with $var = $attributes['key'] pattern. The variables are already available after automatic extraction. Use null coalescing for safety: $logoId ?? null, $sepLink ?? [], etc.

issues.description: Missing @var docblock annotations for camelCase variables in HeaderMain.php
issues.details: PHP file is missing @var annotations for 9 camelCase attribute variables. Without these annotations, PHP_CodeSniffer will warn about camelCase usage (WordPress prefers snake_case). The @var docblock tells the linter these variables come from JavaScript block attributes and should be ignored.
issues.fix:
Add complete @var docblock after the existing file docblock:

/**
 * Available variables (auto-extracted from $attributes):
 * @var int|null $logoId
 * @var array $sepLink
 * @var array $searchLink
 * @var string $mobileCtaText
 * @var array $mobileCtaLink
 * @var bool $fixedOnScrollDesktop
 * @var bool $hideOnScrollDownDesktop
 * @var bool $fixedOnScrollMobile
 * @var bool $hideOnScrollDownMobile
 * @var string $anchor
 *
 * Also available:
 * @var string $children Inner blocks content
 * @var WP_Block $block Block instance
 */

issues.description: Desktop search input has incorrect classes - 'uppercase' instead of 'normal-case placeholder:uppercase'
issues.details: The desktop search input (line 89) has 'uppercase' class which transforms ALL text including user input. The spec requires 'normal-case placeholder:uppercase' so only the placeholder is uppercase but user-typed text is normal case. The mobile search (line 163) is already correct with 'normal-case placeholder:uppercase'. This inconsistency means desktop search will uppercase user input while mobile search won't.
issues.fix:
Change line 89:
FROM: class="bg-transparent! border-0! rounded-none! outline-none font-sans font-medium text-sm leading-[1.16] text-white! uppercase placeholder:text-white/60! placeholder:opacity-100! w-full min-h-0! p-0!"
TO: class="bg-transparent! border-0! rounded-none! outline-none font-sans font-medium text-sm leading-[1.16] text-white! normal-case placeholder:uppercase placeholder:text-white/60! placeholder:opacity-100! w-full min-h-0! p-0!"
Remove manual extraction lines. Add @var docblock for $submenuAlignment (camelCase).

issues.description: HeaderMainItem.php missing @var docblock for camelCase variable
DemoContainer.php uses manual variable assignments instead of relying on auto-extraction
issues.details: Lines 14-15 manually reassign $title and $description to new variables $title_text and $description_text. This is unnecessary - the attributes are already extracted.
issues.fix: Remove lines 14-15 and use $title and $description directly throughout the template. Update @var docblock to remove 'Available variables (auto-extracted from $attributes):' comment since it's redundant.

issues.details: BaseControl component with label but missing id property
issues.fix: Add id property to BaseControl component or use a different control component
Refactor nested ternary to if-else or extract to a function

issues.details: 38 warnings about __experimental* API usage from @wordpress/components and @wordpress/block-editor. These are pre-existing across multiple blocks.
issues.fix: Consider migrating to stable APIs when available or suppress warnings if experimental APIs are approved for use

issues.description: Asset size warnings for editor and screen bundles
issues.details: js/editor.js (346 KiB) and js/screen (380 KiB) exceed recommended limit (244 KiB)
issues.fix: Consider code splitting or lazy loading for large bundles

passedChecks: Keyboard navigation works correctly with ArrowUp/ArrowDown
Fixed header maintains full viewport width with left-0 right-0
DemoContainer has isolate class for stacking context
Mobile search has correct normal-case placeholder:uppercase classes
Submenu has negative margin (md:-ml-6) for text alignment
Logo spans full two-row height (max-h constraint removed)
Test page has 9 header instances with various configurations
Inner blocks render correctly on frontend
